mapper.sql: select config_id, integration_name, platform_name, integration_type, endpoint_url, auth_type, sync_frequency, sync_mode, mapping_rule, transform_rule, retry_policy, status, last_sync_time, last_sync_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_external_integration_config
mapper.insert: insert into nc_external_integration_config (integration_name, platform_name, integration_type, endpoint_url, auth_type, sync_frequency, sync_mode, mapping_rule, transform_rule, retry_policy, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{integrationName}, #{platformName}, #{integrationType}, #{endpointUrl}, #{authType}, #{syncFrequency}, #{syncMode}, #{mappingRule}, #{transformRule}, #{retryPolicy}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_external_sync_log (config_id, integration_name, request_summary, response_status, success_count, failure_count, duration_ms, error_message, retry_count, sync_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{configId}, #{integrationName}, #{requestSummary}, #{responseStatus}, #{successCount}, #{failureCount}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{syncTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
